programme.title: E4 - A Big Day of Imagination & Play
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of imagination & play with Mia & Max! First, they decide to let their imagination run free & build a big dollhouse, but Max has more fun pretending to be a dinosaur that knocks it down! Then, Daddy & Twinkle show the kids how much fun can be had with shadow puppets, making all sorts of different animal shapes. The imaginative fun continues as they turn five empty green bottles into fuzzy-armed monsters that Twinkle brings to life!

programme.title: E2 - Nina's Adventures with Friends
programme.desc: Join Nina on some amazing adventures with her friends! When Nina challenges her school friends to a game of soccer, she imagines herself as a true soccer star playing in a giant stadium at the World Cup! Then, she visits Grandpa's farm where she proves to be an ace tractor driver who never leaves her friends behind. From learning to share a new firetruck to going on an epic chase to get back a lost surprise egg, it's always an adventure with Nina!

programme.title: E3 - The Garage Football Championship
programme.desc: Join Gecko for the garage football championship! When Weasel starts cheating, Gecko must fix the damaged players and use smart strategy to win the game. Help Gecko show everyone that playing fair is the only way to be a true champion!

programme.title: E2 - JJ's Ultimate Pretend Play Day!
programme.desc: It's the ultimate pretend play day with JJ! When the cookies go missing, it's up to Detective JJ & his sidekick Bingo to follow the clues & solve the case. Then, when JJ gets nervous on his first carousel ride, Mom helps him unlock his imagination & he becomes a brave knight on a valiant steed! The pretend play continues as Captain JJ & first mate YoYo set sail on the high seas to find a lost sock. From playing chef to being a Turtle Scout, you can be anything!

programme.title: E4 - Important Lessons with Baby John!
programme.desc: Baby John is learning some very important lessons! First, he refuses to try his veggies & fruits, but Mom finds different ways to convince him after she sees that he'll try them if the other members of the family do it first! Then, Mom helps Baby John get through his morning routine with a fun chart. The important lessons continue as Baby John learns about fire safety with a firefighter & how to stay safe during bathtime.

programme.title: E3 - The Garage Football Championship
programme.desc: Join Gecko for the garage football championship! When Weasel starts cheating, Gecko must fix the damaged players and use smart strategy to win the game. Help Gecko show everyone that playing fair is the only way to be a true champion!

programme.title: E3 - The Ultimate Outdoor Play Day!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate outdoor play day! Mummy & Daddy take the kids to the park to fly colorful Japanese koinobori kites. Then, Mia & Max head to the pond to feed the ducks, but are shocked to find there are no ducks there! They must go on an adventure to find them. The outdoor fun continues as Mummy sets up a painting session in the park, where the kids have fun discovering new colors with their fingers, hands & feet!

programme.title: E2 - Nina's Adventures with Friends

programme.title: E2 - Pirate Songs & Fun Beach Games!
programme.desc: Ahoy, mateys! Join JJ for pirate songs & fun beach games! The adventure begins when JJ & Wally play pirates on the high seas but can't agree on where to find the hidden treasure! Then, when a wave washes away their sandcastle, a little crab helps them try again to build one that's nearly indestructible. The pirate fun continues as Wally tries to swipe JJ's five little duckies during bath time, leading to a sudsy chase to find the ducknapper!

programme.title: TV Patrol Express[Live]
programme.desc: TV Patrol Express, hosted by Jeff Canoy and Denice Dinsay is a quick look at the top stories of the day. A fifteen minute fast-paced newscast, it offers a glimpse of breaking news, stories that developed, and updates to watch out for on TV Patrol for the on-the-go viewer.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: Juan Big Bite
programme.desc: From mouthwatering recipes to restaurant reviews and glimpses of my everyday life, my goal is to serve up content that excites your taste buds. Let's celebrate the joy of good food together - Juan Big Bite at a time!

programme.title: Tao Po[Live]
programme.desc: 'Tao Po' is a compelling Current Affairs program that uncovers the lives of the 'real people' behind the headlines, offering intimate interviews and insightful glimpses into their personal journeys and the issues they represent.

programme.title: E3 - It's Time To Press A Flower
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran press a flower so that it will last for a long time. JoJo learns that flowers wilt over time but flower pressing is a special way to make them last longer.

programme.title: E107 - Stan's showtime / The Truth is Out There
programme.desc: Stan claims to have a real Marsupilami appearing in a show he's putting on, but it's a fake robot. // Acu thinks a fish-loving alien is in town, and Mica offers to help him track it down.

programme.title: E107 - Picture Perfect / Undie Pressure
programme.desc: Lincoln plots to take the 'perfect' family photo for his parents' anniversary gift. // Lincoln and his sisters bet on who can go the longest without doing their most annoying habits.

programme.title: E110 - Smile for the Camera / School invaders
programme.desc: Rosa installs security cameras at the park, and people hate being spied on. // When the Twins take the Marsupilamis to school, Stan spots Twister and claims a poisonous frog is loose to gain access.

programme.title: E202 - Intern for the Worse / The Old and the Restless
programme.desc: Tensions run high when Lincoln and Clyde both get an internship at Flip's and compete to win the manager title. // When Lincoln sees how tame Pop Pop has gotten in his older age, he takes him out for a day to remember.

programme.title: E201 - Basic Zipper Merging Etiquette / How to Bag a Beast
programme.desc: The family gets stuck in a traffic jam that leads to all human civility getting thrown out the passenger side window. // Jack and Lily attempt to catch a legendary town fish despite horror stories from townsfolk who have tried and failed before them.

programme.title: E207 - iHurt Lewbert
programme.desc: A 'Messing With Lewbert' sketch goes horribly awry, injuring Carly’s obnoxious doorman. The gang nurses him back to health until Freddie’s mother steps in and takes over. When a romance starts to blossom they have to stop it.

programme.title: E201 - Ain't That a Glitch Part One
programme.desc: After Marky discovers Lay Lay's secret, he takes advantage by having her use her powers to do what he says. But when an overworked Lay Lay starts glitching, Marky and Sadie must fix her before the girls have to perform at an awards show.

programme.title: E112 - Follow the Sprinkles / Canyon Valley V. Dirk
programme.desc: When Lily starts digging to find out why her favorite ice cream truck is selling shaved ice, she uncovers a town-wide conspiracy. // Dirk is wrongfully accused of stealing a Canyon Valley landmark so Min comes out of lawyer retirement to help him.

programme.title: E110 - Smile for the Camera / School invaders
programme.desc: Rosa installs security cameras at the park, and people hate being spied on. // When the Twins take the Marsupilamis to school, Stan spots Twister and claims a poisonous frog is loose to gain access.

programme.title: E405 - Brawl In The Hall
programme.desc: When Charlotte is challenged to a fight at school, Captain Man and Kid Danger step in to try and help Charlotte defend herself.

programme.title: E207 - iHurt Lewbert
programme.desc: A 'Messing With Lewbert' sketch goes horribly awry, injuring Carly’s obnoxious doorman. The gang nurses him back to health until Freddie’s mother steps in and takes over. When a romance starts to blossom they have to stop it.

programme.title: E252 - Mind the Gap / Dirty Bubble Returns
programme.desc: Squidward closes the gap in SpongeBob's teeth, which causes a dramatic and unexpected change in his demeanor. // The newly reformed 'Clean Bubble' takes a dishwashing job at the Krusty Krab, where he is tempted by the grime.

programme.title: E202 - Now Museum, Now You Don't
programme.desc: Cecil works a new temp job as a security guard at Lady Upturn's art museum.

programme.title: E107 - Stan's showtime / The Truth is Out There
programme.desc: Stan claims to have a real Marsupilami appearing in a show he's putting on, but it's a fake robot. // Acu thinks a fish-loving alien is in town, and Mica offers to help him track it down.

programme.title: E903 - Meet the Purrents / Apartment Complex
programme.desc: When Lori and Bobby find a kitten, they decide to coparent and swap the kitten back and forth between their homes. // After telling her family how great her apartment is, Lori unknowingly entices her sisters to secretly take over her space.

programme.title: E114 - Shell-shock / The Amazing Coat Man
programme.desc: The twins and Marsupilamis save an egg from the Jaguar, which hatches into a baby crocodile. // The Marsupilamis are helping people, and Callie wants to find out who the 'Amazing Coat Man' hero is.

Abolish Prisons? - What Works Better Than Incarceration
programme.desc: Approximately 58,000 people are currently incarcerated in German prisons. Over half of them reoffend after their release. These statistics raise doubts about the prison system. Is something fundamentally wrong with German prisons?

programme.title: Operation Barbarossa - War Of Annihilation - Part 2 - Winter
programme.desc: In early September 1941, the German Wehrmacht was advancing on all fronts in the Soviet Union. Kyiv had fallen, the Smolensk stronghold had been defeated and Leningrad was under siege. Hitler intended to launch a major offensive against Moscow before the winter.

programme.title: Philadelphia Travel Guide: Independence Hall, Liberty Bell And American His

While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.desc: Stanley Tucci explores Bologna, seen by many as the food capital of Italy. He breaks open a fresh cheese wheel with Massimo Bottura and meets the niece of Federico Fellini.

programme.desc: The last leg of Joanna Lumley's journey takes her by dhow to Zanzibar, the spice island of Africa where merchants from around the world have left their mark on the architecture, religion and music.

programme.title: À l'affiche
programme.desc: Comment les cinéastes, les romanciers, les artistes racontent-ils le monde ? France 24 part à la rencontre d'une culture engagée dans son temps.

programme.title: E3 - Walking with a Pangolin
programme.desc: Crush a busy day with the team as they release rehabbed pythons, teach a pangolin how to hunt, and round up a troop of vervet monkeys. Search for a missing bird of prey with Dr. Charlotte, while Dr. Amanda helps a bushpig savaged by poachers’ dogs.

programme.title: E4 - Tsiba's New Mum
programme.desc: Tackle an emergency when Dr. Amanda removes a sable antelope’s tracking collar, and see the animal-care team help a flea-riddled baby vervet monkey find a new mom. Free two orphaned serval cats and follow 20 yellow baboons into their new enclosure.

programme.title: E3 - Walking with a Pangolin
programme.desc: Crush a busy day with the team as they release rehabbed pythons, teach a pangolin how to hunt, and round up a troop of vervet monkeys. Search for a missing bird of prey with Dr. Charlotte, while Dr. Amanda helps a bushpig savaged by poachers’ dogs.

programme.title: E4 - Tsiba's New Mum
programme.desc: Tackle an emergency when Dr. Amanda removes a sable antelope’s tracking collar, and see the animal-care team help a flea-riddled baby vervet monkey find a new mom. Free two orphaned serval cats and follow 20 yellow baboons into their new enclosure.

programme.title: E6 - Shark Dentist
programme.desc: Marvel at the toothy fish that help sharks maintain their pearly whites and discover the signature calls of dolphin families. Examine capuchin monkey’s nut-cracking stone tools, get the warm fuzzies when giraffes snuggle, and meet a meerkat mobster.

programme.title: E3 - Into the Fire
programme.desc: Bask in the largest intact savannah on the planet, where mammals and insects fly through the air with the greatest of ease. Study traditional wildfire-management methods, explore a sandstone refuge, and watch a sugar glider try to escape the flames.

programme.title: After the Wildfires
programme.desc: Examine fire’s pivotal role in shaping Australia’s natural world. Tour the devastation left by 2020’s brutal bush-fire season, learn how climate change fuelled this watershed event, and chart the long-term recovery of the continent’s wildlife.

programme.title: E4 - Mountains
programme.desc: Climb into a realm of thin air and towering rock. Tag along as mythical monkeys battle for a winter food stash, sing along with lemurs in a fruit-filled tree canopy, and watch an aromatic tree bring together blossom and possum in a moonlit tryst.

programme.title: E9 - Giant Otter Refuge
programme.desc: Join biologists on a hike through a giant otter refuge in the southern Pantanal. Will they find these shy, elusive animals or just the evidence of their day-to-day lives? On the trail, check in on amorous tapirs and water-loving Muscovy ducks.

programme.title: E3 - Walking with a Pangolin
programme.desc: Crush a busy day with the team as they release rehabbed pythons, teach a pangolin how to hunt, and round up a troop of vervet monkeys. Search for a missing bird of prey with Dr. Charlotte, while Dr. Amanda helps a bushpig savaged by poachers’ dogs.

programme.title: E4 - Tsiba's New Mum
programme.desc: Tackle an emergency when Dr. Amanda removes a sable antelope’s tracking collar, and see the animal-care team help a flea-riddled baby vervet monkey find a new mom. Free two orphaned serval cats and follow 20 yellow baboons into their new enclosure.

programme.title: E2 - North America
programme.desc: Experience the powerful, colourful phenomena that swirl across the heavens in North America. Watch polar bears search for food under the aurora borealis, map the frigid path of a polar vortex, and elude violent tornadoes with a prairie dog family.

programme.title: E3 - Into the Fire
programme.desc: Bask in the largest intact savannah on the planet, where mammals and insects fly through the air with the greatest of ease. Study traditional wildfire-management methods, explore a sandstone refuge, and watch a sugar glider try to escape the flames.

programme.desc: Join biologists on a hike through a giant otter refuge in the southern Pantanal. Will they find these shy, elusive animals or just the evidence of their day-to-day lives? On the trail, check in on amorous tapirs and water-loving Muscovy ducks.

programme.title: E3 - Walking with a Pangolin
programme.desc: Crush a busy day with the team as they release rehabbed pythons, teach a pangolin how to hunt, and round up a troop of vervet monkeys. Search for a missing bird of prey with Dr. Charlotte, while Dr. Amanda helps a bushpig savaged by poachers’ dogs.

programme.title: E6 - Shark Dentist
programme.desc: Marvel at the toothy fish that help sharks maintain their pearly whites and discover the signature calls of dolphin families. Examine capuchin monkey’s nut-cracking stone tools, get the warm fuzzies when giraffes snuggle, and meet a meerkat mobster.

programme.title: E3 - Into the Fire
programme.desc: Bask in the largest intact savannah on the planet, where mammals and insects fly through the air with the greatest of ease. Study traditional wildfire-management methods, explore a sandstone refuge, and watch a sugar glider try to escape the flames.

programme.title: After the Wildfires
programme.desc: Examine fire’s pivotal role in shaping Australia’s natural world. Tour the devastation left by 2020’s brutal bush-fire season, learn how climate change fuelled this watershed event, and chart the long-term recovery of the continent’s wildlife.

programme.title: E4 - Mountains
programme.desc: Climb into a realm of thin air and towering rock. Tag along as mythical monkeys battle for a winter food stash, sing along with lemurs in a fruit-filled tree canopy, and watch an aromatic tree bring together blossom and possum in a moonlit tryst.

programme.title: E9 - Giant Otter Refuge
programme.desc: Join biologists on a hike through a giant otter refuge in the southern Pantanal. Will they find these shy, elusive animals or just the evidence of their day-to-day lives? On the trail, check in on amorous tapirs and water-loving Muscovy ducks.

programme.title: E3 - Walking with a Pangolin
programme.desc: Crush a busy day with the team as they release rehabbed pythons, teach a pangolin how to hunt, and round up a troop of vervet monkeys. Search for a missing bird of prey with Dr. Charlotte, while Dr. Amanda helps a bushpig savaged by poachers’ dogs.

programme.title: E4 - Tsiba's New Mum
programme.desc: Tackle an emergency when Dr. Amanda removes a sable antelope’s tracking collar, and see the animal-care team help a flea-riddled baby vervet monkey find a new mom. Free two orphaned serval cats and follow 20 yellow baboons into their new enclosure.

programme.title: E2 - North America
programme.desc: Experience the powerful, colourful phenomena that swirl across the heavens in North America. Watch polar bears search for food under the aurora borealis, map the frigid path of a polar vortex, and elude violent tornadoes with a prairie dog family.

programme.title: E3 - Into the Fire
programme.desc: Bask in the largest intact savannah on the planet, where mammals and insects fly through the air with the greatest of ease. Study traditional wildfire-management methods, explore a sandstone refuge, and watch a sugar glider try to escape the flames.

programme.title: After the Wildfires
programme.desc: Examine fire’s pivotal role in shaping Australia’s natural world. Tour the devastation left by 2020’s brutal bush-fire season, learn how climate change fuelled this watershed event, and chart the long-term recovery of the continent’s wildlife.

programme.title: E6 - Youngsters of the Desert
programme.desc: A young lion cub must survive as his family is torn apart; two adolescent leopard cubs must fend for themselves after they are abandoned, and a young adult blackbuck must risk life and limb as he tries to secure his first mating.

programme.title: E7 - Rajan Monkey on a Mission
programme.desc: Rajan is the powerful alpha male who sits at the head of an unusually large troop. He has done well to sustain such a big group, but the future doesn’t look so bright. There are more mouths to feed, and yet his jungle home is shrinking.

programme.title: E8 - Temple Monkeys on the Run
programme.desc: Nestled on the edge of the ancient city of Jodhpur, the luxurious Temple Gardens are home to a huge troop of Hanuman Langurs, who enjoy a peaceful life of bounty. But the troop has a strict hierarchy.

programme.title: E10 - Path of the Matriarch
programme.desc: In southern India, the summer is a challenge for Asian elephants who must drink every day. As things dry up, Anura, the matriarch, leads her herd to a distant watering hole. But will she succeed in getting her 3-month-old grandson there in time?

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 寧檬一直有一個成為投資總監的職業夢想，可畢業後做的工作卻與夢想相距甚遠。她的上司陸既明是一個業務能力極強的投資總裁，他不認為寧檬也能成為合格的投資人。某一天寧檬終於下定決心離開陸既明，向他也向自己證明她可以做到。寧檬重新求職，經過種種阻礙，機緣下最終進入了鷹石投資，開始了她的晉升之路。過程中陸既明也在關注着寧檬，起初他不認可，但在重要關頭還是會對寧檬進行提點，幫助她度過難關。陸既明長遠的投資理念使寧檬獲益匪淺，寧檬也改變了陸既明的處世態度。兩人互相影響，攜手並進，經歷了無數的波折和風浪之後，寧檬蜕變成為了獨當一面的金牌投資人，陸既明也歷練得更加成熟有擔當。他們認定彼此就是自己最正確的那個人。

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 盛唐初年，氣象萬千；夜魅長安，業孽浮屠。光怪陸離之下盡是怪異之事，血雨腥風間暗藏獵殺危局。盛世奇譚，詭案揭幕。

programme.desc: 盛唐初年，氣象萬千；夜魅長安，業孽浮屠。光怪陸離之下盡是怪異之事，血雨腥風間暗藏獵殺危局。盛世奇譚，詭案揭幕。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 寧檬一直有一個成為投資總監的職業夢想，可畢業後做的工作卻與夢想相距甚遠。她的上司陸既明是一個業務能力極強的投資總裁，他不認為寧檬也能成為合格的投資人。某一天寧檬終於下定決心離開陸既明，向他也向自己證明她可以做到。寧檬重新求職，經過種種阻礙，機緣下最終進入了鷹石投資，開始了她的晉升之路。過程中陸既明也在關注着寧檬，起初他不認可，但在重要關頭還是會對寧檬進行提點，幫助她度過難關。陸既明長遠的投資理念使寧檬獲益匪淺，寧檬也改變了陸既明的處世態度。兩人互相影響，攜手並進，經歷了無數的波折和風浪之後，寧檬蜕變成為了獨當一面的金牌投資人，陸既明也歷練得更加成熟有擔當。他們認定彼此就是自己最正確的那個人。

E10 - East Region 3: Dj's Last Call
programme.desc: The competition continues with competitors pushing their bodies to the limit by battling opponents in unforgiving head-to-head challenges, designed by host and executive producer Dwayne Johnson. In these Eastern division battles we see Josh Porter go up against Blake Broadhurst for the men while Shantal Athill takes on Courtney Roselle for the women. They will compete on obstacles such as Launch Pad, Over the Edge, Nuts and Bolts and Lunar Impact. Winners will move on to face reigning Titan’s on Mt. Olympus, the consummate athletic test of speed, strength, agility and endurance. Cari Champion and Alex Mendez serve as commentators.

programme.title: E18 - Irreconcilable Dungferences
programme.desc: Skip and Chip have a big fight, and it's up to Lazlo to get them back together again.

programme.desc: Mr. J and Andy exclude Rodney from their club, so he hangs out with Mrs. J's ladies group.

programme.title: E6 - Kids Who Love The Earth
programme.desc: This HBO documentary features kids from around the world as they take on our biggest environmental challenges.

programme.title: E18 - Mellow Fellows
programme.desc: Slips is one depressed snake. Until, that is, he befriends a new mentor, Mr. Mandrill, and realizes that his life's calling is to be a guidance counselor, too.

programme.title: E11 - Eastern Regional Finals
programme.desc: Olympic gold-medal winning snowboarder Hannah Teter and five-time UFC champion Tyron Woodley return along with four other top competitors from the Eastern Region for one last shot at redemption. The contenders face off in a three-way battle before advancing to a classic head-to-head competition. The last competitors standing must defeat the reigning Titans on Mt. Olympus to advance to the championship round. Dwayne Johnson serves as Host while Cari Champion and Alex Mendez serve as commentators.

programme.title: E432
programme.desc: C'EST LA VIE: C'est La Vie focuses on the real experiences of ordinary people amid the tide of the times. Through in-depth interviews and observational filming, it presents a vivid social visual archive of contemporary China with authentic life stories. With profound humanistic care and compelling narrative tension, it has earned widespread acclaim and numerous awards both at home and abroad, establishing itself as a benchmark in Chinese-language documentaries. Continuously conveying warmth and strength, it inspires viewers to reflect deeply on humanity and destiny.
PHOENIX EVENING EXPRESS: Phoenix Evening Express reports world events with in-depth coverage of the latest social, economic, cultural and sports news from Mainland China, Taiwan and Hong Kong.

programme.title: E126
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan's first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: E614 - Where The Pawn Stars Roam
programme.desc: When Rick reels in an antique glass fishing buoy made in Japan, he hopes the seller's price floats his boat. Meanwhile, Chum checks out a rare dinosaur fossil. Can he dig up a good price?

programme.title: E6 - The Marvelous World Of Disney
programme.desc: For nearly 70 years, Disney has pushed the boundaries of art and science through the work of a team of dreamers, designers, and builders known as the Imagineers.

programme.title: E19 - Photo Bombs
programme.desc: An underdog breaks the mould by creating instant photography, revolutionising how we take photos. And it kicks off a war of innovation between two companies battling to be the number one camera brand.

programme.title: Vat 69: Malaysia's Very Able Troopers
programme.desc: Trained by the British SAS, they were formed in 1969 to combat the resurgent Communists. Uncover the heroism and sacrifices of Malaysia's elite commandoes.

programme.title: E4 - Apocalypse How?
programme.desc: For millennia, there has been speculation about how the world will end. From the detailed account in the Book of Revelation to the prophecies foretold by Nostradamus. Could any of these come true?

programme.desc: An underdog breaks the mould by creating instant photography, revolutionising how we take photos. And it kicks off a war of innovation between two companies battling to be the number one camera brand.

programme.title: E9 - Obstacle Enduro
programme.desc: Matt takes the team through a 6 hour obstacle enduro at Raw Challenge on the Gold Coast before the series wrap-up and the announcement of our Most Savage for the season.

programme.title: E1 - Legendary Predators (Lions)
programme.desc: Coyote explores the power of lions and asks: Would you hold paws with the King of the Jungle?

programme.title: E2 - Speed and Showdown (Cheetah & Jaguar)
programme.desc: Witness a meeting with a cheetah and the ultimate showdown between a jaguar and a caiman.

programme.title: E1 - Trial by Fire
programme.desc: The Darnell’s 9-month show tour begins in Cayuga as Driver, Chris prepares rookie, Wayner for his first show as Shockwave's solo-Crew Chief, a role that could literally be the difference between life or death for Chris.

programme.title: E3 - Highlight 3
programme.desc: Crouch Recovery Op Jim and heavy mechanic Jack are faced with an increasingly complex recovery challenge. A foreign truck with dodgy suspension airbags and a catalogue of other problems makes towing it anywhere a real headache and a potential threat to other road users. Lantern Recovery op Sean is in a race against time to get a fully loaded dual tanker off a busy stretch of motorway. And recovery op Merrie has a nightmare when an unforeseeable problem leaves her stranded in a live lane of the motorway when towing a car transporter.

programme.title: E1 - Legendary Predators (Lions)
programme.desc: Coyote explores the power of lions and asks: Would you hold paws with the King of the Jungle?

programme.title: E2 - Speed and Showdown (Cheetah & Jaguar)
programme.desc: Witness a meeting with a cheetah and the ultimate showdown between a jaguar and a caiman.

programme.title: E1 - Save this Shark
programme.desc: 3x World Surf Champion turned wildlife conservationist Mick Fanning teams up with leading experts in new documentary SAVE THIS SHARK. Mick Fanning is on a new mission to explore shark conservation. The 3x world surfing champion will hop around the world teaming up with experts and conservationists to uncover the hidden truths about sharks, threats and how to save them from extinction. Mick will investigate the issue of sharks versus people and present problems as well as discover the latest technological solutions in how to keep both humans and sharks safe to coexist. Our host has had some incredible achievements throughout his professional career, but one moment stood out to the world live on television in 2015. A shark encounter at the J-Bay Open saw Mick Fanning become ‘the guy who punched a shark’. A huge part of saving sharks is convincing people that they need our help and putting aside the fear factor. In Save This Shark, Mick takes this incredible opportunity to go on his ow

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: Six single celebrities in their 40s choose co-living in Gugi-dong as “Life Mates,” sharing laughter, challenges, and fresh memories while redefining modern family through friendship.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Yu-mi, a bestselling novelist, meets her new editor Soon-rok. With her Love Cell still asleep from heartbreak, his quiet charm stirs something new. Could he be her long awaited endgame?

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: Upon achieving the coveted status of a landlord, mounting debts lead Soo-Jong into participating a staged kidnapping, yet the plan spirals out of control as the fake kidnapping turns dangerously real.

programme.title: E135
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E135
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E9 - Verviers
programme.desc: Verviers is located in the basin of the Vesdre valley and has an urban landscape that tells the story of its past flourishing wool industry. We go discovering!

programme.title: E2 - Piotre (Paris)/Ninon Reo (Barcelona)
programme.desc: In the Belleville district of Paris, Richard Orlinski meets Piotre, a street artist who mixes pop art and graffiti, using primary colours to create dynamic frescoes. Together they complete a work that embodies the spirit of the positive vandal. In the backstreets of Barcelona's Raval district, Ninon Reo combines art and social interactions. A former financial consultant turned urban artist and illustrator, she creates hybrid works that borrow from comic strips.

programme.title: E4 - Split Pea Veloute, Chickpea Gnocchi
programme.desc: Accompanied by Brigitte Rosset, Annick Jeanmairet offers a coconut curry split pea veloute and chickpea gnocchi. Discovery of the day: cold-pressed fruit juices from Valais.

programme.title: E115
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. programme.title: E85 - Sens (Best Of)
programme.desc: Highlights from the program filmed in Sens.

programme.title: E4 - Wendy's Ark
programme.desc: Wendy Pichard heads La Bouche qui rit, the first refuge for farm animals in French speaking Switzerland. Pigs, horses, donkeys, goats, sheep... With her team, she rescues and cares for abused animals or those destined for slaughter.

programme.title: E9 - Paname Takes The Plunge
programme.desc: Paris was built around the Seine: its streets are numbered according to their position in relation to the river. Its coat of arms and motto, 'Fluctuat nec mergitur', refer to water. Immerse yourself in this major element of Parisian life.

programme.title: E4 - Split Pea Veloute, Chickpea Gnocchi
programme.desc: Accompanied by Brigitte Rosset, Annick Jeanmairet offers a coconut curry split pea veloute and chickpea gnocchi. Discovery of the day: cold-pressed fruit juices from Valais.

programme.title: E1 - Terroirs Of Excellence In The Provencal Alps
programme.desc: From Saint-Paul-de-Vence to the Roya Valley, in the hinterland of Nice, enthusiasts are fighting to promote their territory. By reviving an old perfume house or creating a high-end spirit with small spelt, these artisans are committed to preserving their precious heritage.

programme.title: E4 - Wendy's Ark
programme.desc: Wendy Pichard heads La Bouche qui rit, the first refuge for farm animals in French speaking Switzerland. Pigs, horses, donkeys, goats, sheep... With her team, she rescues and cares for abused animals or those destined for slaughter.

programme.title: E9 - Paname Takes The Plunge
programme.desc: Paris was built around the Seine: its streets are numbered according to their position in relation to the river. Its coat of arms and motto, 'Fluctuat nec mergitur', refer to water. Immerse yourself in this major element of Parisian life.

programme.title: E4 - Split Pea Veloute, Chickpea Gnocchi
programme.desc: Accompanied by Brigitte Rosset, Annick Jeanmairet offers a coconut curry split pea veloute and chickpea gnocchi. Discovery of the day: cold-pressed fruit juices from Valais.

programme.title: E18 - Cantal, On The Shoulder Of A Giant
programme.desc: An ancient volcano with grandiose landscapes, Cantal reveals a raw and preserved nature, shaped by time and humans.

programme.title: E18 - Cantal, On The Shoulder Of A Giant
programme.desc: An ancient volcano with grandiose landscapes, Cantal reveals a raw and preserved nature, shaped by time and humans.

programme.title: E209 - The Crew Builds A Ferris Wheel / The Crew Builds A Farm Animal Yoga Space
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to give Grocer Gabriel the best beach day ever... including a ride on a brand new Ferris wheel at the boardwalk! // When Farmer Zoe's animals need some relaxation, the pups build a perfect place to practice yoga with Coach Karima.

programme.title: E401 - The Crew Builds A Fancy Drive-Thru Restaurant / The Crew Builds A Castle Sh
programme.desc: When Camila the truck driver needs a place to stop and eat, the pups and Cafe Carl have a fancy idea. But is it too fancy? // Park Ranger Rose and Rosie the goat are putting on a show! But when Rosie disappears, can the pups find her before showtime?

programme.title: E306 - Baby Steel / Joke's On You
programme.desc: When Steel accidentally turns himself into a baby, he wreaks havoc on Platinum City. // It's the annual 'Day of Fun'! However when Ricardo and Trickalien play the ultimate prank on the Deer Squad, the day of fun soon turns into a day of chaos!

programme.title: E850 - Windmills
programme.desc: Peppa and friends are at playgroup and Mr Bull is building a wind turbine. Madame Gazelle tells the children all about wind power, whilst Mr Bull and the workmen have a lovely cup of tea made from wind power.

programme.title: E852 - The Sandcastle
programme.desc: Peppa and her family have a day out at the seaside and build a very large sandcastle with all their friends.

programme.title: E112 - Books / Betty Caterpillar
programme.desc: The children wonder where stars go in the daytime. They can't find the answer, so go to the Great Elf Library. // Ben and Holly meet Betty Caterpillar, but she is sad because she can't fly, until she turns into a beautiful butterfly.

programme.title: E104 - Tool Duel
programme.desc: Gabby is the mechanic all the Monster Machines in town count on to fix them up. But when Crusher steals all her tools, Gabby needs Blaze's help to get them back!

programme.title: E112 - Books / Betty Caterpillar
programme.desc: The children wonder where stars go in the daytime. They can't find the answer, so go to the Great Elf Library. // Ben and Holly meet Betty Caterpillar, but she is sad because she can't fly, until she turns into a beautiful butterfly.

programme.title: E125 - Barbabravo Is Not Feeling Well
programme.desc: Following a misadventure, Barbabravo is unable to transform at all. The whole family unites to help him.

programme.title: E105 - Moon Cow / Nebulator / Space Bug
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner. // Kai is super excited to ride the Nebulator, but Tim isn't so sure. // Tim and Kai try to photograph the illusive SpaceBug.

programme.title: E224 - The Balloon Ride
programme.desc: Peppa wins the top prize in a raffle at school: a trip in a hot air balloon. Mummy Pig, Daddy Pig, George and Peppa climb aboard and enjoy the flight until the balloon gets caught in a tree. Luckily, the balloon has landed in a very familiar garden.

programme.title: E609 - The Great Pizza Race
programme.desc: It's a head-to-head showdown when Blaze and Crusher enter... The Great Pizza Race! Who will deliver all of their pizzas first and win the coveted Great Pizza Trophy?

programme.title: E115 - The Crew Builds A School / The Crew Builds A Waterway
programme.desc: It's the first day of school in Builder Cove... if Rubble & Crew can finish the building in time! / The pups need a construction solution to save Farmer Zoe's crops and to keep Crunchy the beaver from taking all the water!

programme.title: E405 - Dora & Diego Rescue Baby Jaguar / Diego's Awesome Owl Adventure
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Diego rescue a baby jaguar after it gets lost deep in the rainforest. // Dora, Boots, and Diego help a baby burrowing owl find its parents and make it home.

programme.title: E202 - The Crew Builds A Train Station / The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Sign
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build the first train station in Builder Cove just in time to welcome Farmer Zoe's new cow Mooreen. // Popstar Sierra Sparkle is moving to Builder Cove! But when the pups plan a surprise greeting, Speed Meister makes a plan of his own.

programme.title: E821 - Dancing With Luke Stars! / Pups Save A Mischievous Octopus
programme.desc: A dance contest being judged by Luke Stars goes wrong when a floating dancefloor carries the contestants away. // The pups investigate a mystery at an undersea-themed museum exhibit and discover an octopus that wants to return to the ocean

programme.title: E112 - Books / Betty Caterpillar
programme.desc: The children wonder where stars go in the daytime. They can't find the answer, so go to the Great Elf Library. // Ben and Holly meet Betty Caterpillar, but she is sad because she can't fly, until she turns into a beautiful butterfly.

programme.title: E719 - Super Wheels Vs. Pancakeio
programme.desc: When Pancakeio the Pancake Wizard takes all the pancakes in Axle City, it's up to Blaze, Stripes, and Starla to become superheroes! Using their Super Wheels, they've got to get those pancakes back- just in time for breakfast!

programme.title: E205 - Crabby Wedding
programme.desc: Dora's crab friends are getting married but Swiper swipes the ring and loses it in the ocean. Dora has to get the ring back!

programme.title: E103 - Best Friend
programme.desc: Peppa Pig's best friend, Suzy Sheep, comes over to visit.

programme.title: E209 - Super Tim
programme.desc: Uncle Tiberius comes to visit the Rexes, and Tim must be on his best behaviour.

programme.title: E222 - Sports Day
programme.desc: It is Sports Day at Peppa's playgroup. There are lots of exciting events, including running, jumping and the “tug of war”. Daddy Pig tells Peppa that it's not the winning that matters.

programme.title: E224 - The Balloon Ride
programme.desc: Peppa wins the top prize in a raffle at school: a trip in a hot air balloon. Mummy Pig, Daddy Pig, George and Peppa climb aboard and enjoy the flight until the balloon gets caught in a tree. Luckily, the balloon has landed in a very familiar garden.

programme.desc: Barbabravo can't stay put and is unable to focus one an activity for very long. Barbalala offers to teach him control. Will she succeed?

programme.title: E29 - Take Good Care Of Your Teeth/The Doberman's Favorite
programme.desc: Traces of the Bobobobobone are detected at a tooth exhibition. Shiro examines the various models of animal teeth when Deca begins chasing after Shiro.

programme.title: E433 - Winning Tokens/Game Of Marbles/Five-Star Bowl/Lost Object/Crab Crush/Pirates In Sight
programme.desc: The Lemmings have set up a mini-fair but Grizzy steals the Lemmings' tickets in order to hit the jackpot

programme.title: E140 - Basketbugs / A Skate Of Confusion!/Happy Birdy To You/Spring Forward, Fall Flat/Orego
programme.desc: Bugs Bunny plays some streetball.

programme.title: E59 - The Return/The Nemesis/The Crew/The Others/The Signature
programme.desc: Dad has to make the kids on time for their first day back at school. But he's overslept and now he can't find Gumball, Darwin or Anais anywhere. He sets about retracing his steps from the day before, to work out where they might be. When he finally figures out where they are, it's a race against time to rescue them and prove to himself - and Mum - that he's not a bad father.

programme.title: E58 - The Fair/Lucy's Brother/Professor Lampwick/Lunch With Tables/Grizzly The Movie
programme.desc: The Baby Bears become prizes for a carnival game in hopes of being won and taken to a new home.

programme.title: E34 - B. Vegetables/The Mask/Slumber Party/Serious Business/Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Beast Boy persuades the other Titans into becoming vegetarians, but some of the converts take their new dietary restrictions a little too seriously.

programme.title: E114 - The Condiment Incident/The Dolphin For The Job
programme.desc: Bianca and Jim smuggle goods onto the sub, but when Cyril discovers their side hustle and opens a jar of pickles, it contaminates the ship’s ecosystem. Their only hope: 'Operation Lollipop' to seal that jar!

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 故事講述女主角韓苡茱撞見自己的老公鄭世赫與繼妹韓宥拉出軌後車禍身亡，再次醒來後竟回到四個月前準備試婚紗的時候。得知老公劈腿真相的她決定復仇，於是找上本來要與繼妹相親的徐道國展開聯姻，準備一場手撕綠茶繼妹的報仇計畫。

programme.title: E7

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 有著「洪吉童」封號的女義賊洪恩祖（南志鉉 飾）專偷貪官的財富，為百姓謀取福祉，怎料在她受到道月大君李烈（文相敏 飾）追捕時，兩人竟然意外互換靈魂！在互換靈魂的期間，兩人拋開成見重新認識彼此，一起攜手守護百姓，最終收穫珍貴的愛情。

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Our Happy Days
programme.desc: A chaotic, high-stakes family saga where a seemingly perfect man and an endearingly flawed woman collide while every generation fights to become the main character of their own life.

programme.title: Recipe For Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: Music Bank
programme.desc: The best tunes in Korea! the most sensational music show on TV satisfies all your senses! Fantastic performances and Awe-inspiring harmony by the nation's top musicians! Follow the latest trend in the Korean music scene through the K-chart, a summary of the week's hottest songs.

programme.desc: A chaotic, high-stakes family saga where a seemingly perfect man and an endearingly flawed woman collide while every generation fights to become the main character of their own life.

programme.title: Hit The Top
programme.desc: In the year 1993, K-pop idol Yoo Hyunjae accidentally travels through time to the year 2017. Discovering that he is presumed dead, he begins to investigate what exactly has happened while trying to adjust to life in the 21st century.

programme.title: Baogu Produces -The Frontline of Cold War
programme.desc: The long-awaited “Cold War” series returns! Director Longman Leung together with Terrance Lau and Louise Wong disclose the untold stories of filming “Cold War 1994”. While Terrance reveals filming car chase scenes had been his brush with death, Louise confesses to being stressed to play the role of a gang boss for the first time that took her three months of preparation for the action scenes. Longman also shares about the tycoon kidnapping case in the film inspired by real cases from the 1990s......

programme.title: Good Times, Bed Times
programme.desc: Carrie left Raymond not because he had too many other women, but only because he slept with another woman right on the bed Carrie has always been obsessed with. After the break up, she begged for ownership of the bed she's gotten used to. Carrie was assigned to follow the story of city's celebrated super cop, Paul Ko. While exchanging fire he was shot at by an AK-47 and become a sexual impotent. During the process of interviewing, Carrie has fallen to Paul. Raymond is being considered for a promotion to district court, his superiors request for him to stay away from the night-life and women. In the thick of this difficult celibate period, an 18 year old girl called Tabby barges into Raymond's life...
